Zhuge Pan и«ёи‘ӣж”Җ
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Zhuge Pan (и«ёи‘ӣж”Җ). The son of Zhuge Qiao. After Zhuge KeвҖҷs death, was restored as Zhuge JinвҖҷs heir. Zhuge Pan was affiliated with the Shu Kingdom and the Wu Kingdom.
